examples: They're opening up a branch in London.
They opened up a new restaurant.
When did you open up this store?
He opened up a shop downtown.
It took time for him to open up.
She opened up her own business.
Don't be afraid to open up.
He finally opened up about his problems.
They opened up about their feelings.
She opened up to her therapist.
example_translate: Он наконец открылся о своих проблемах.
open up.synonyms:
Открывать (магазин, бизнес) - start, launch, establish
Открываться, становиться откровенным - confide, share feelings
